# Cortex Skills

Curated skill files that teach AI agents how to build on the Cortex intelligence ecosystem. Fetch the root skill for an overview, then fetch sub-skills as needed.

> Entry point: cortexskills.org/SKILL.md

## Sub-Skills

### Core
- `cortexskills.org/cortex/SKILL.md` — Use a running instance: sync memory, search, ask (agentic deep research).
- `cortexskills.org/setup/SKILL.md` — Self-host Cortex via Docker, environment variables.
- `cortexskills.org/auth/SKILL.md` — API keys (read/manage + admin key), collection scoping, prompt security.
- `cortexskills.org/admin/SKILL.md` — Instance management, AgentSkills, export/import, system reset.

### Features
- `cortexskills.org/upload/SKILL.md` — Document ingestion, formats, chunking.
- `cortexskills.org/search/SKILL.md` — Hybrid search (vector + keyword + graph).
- `cortexskills.org/ask/SKILL.md` — RAG Q&A, streaming, agentic reasoning.
- `cortexskills.org/graph/SKILL.md` — Knowledge graph, entities, relationships.
- `cortexskills.org/collections/SKILL.md` — Scoping documents by project/tenant.
- `cortexskills.org/communities/SKILL.md` — Auto-clustering and summarization.
- `cortexskills.org/git-integration/SKILL.md` — Connect GitHub/GitLab/Gitea repos; agent opens PRs.
- `cortexskills.org/web-import/SKILL.md` — Harvest web pages into markdown via crawl4ai (MDHarvest).
- `cortexskills.org/tasks/SKILL.md` — Background task polling, cancellation, cleanup.

### Ecosystem
- `cortexskills.org/hermes/SKILL.md` — Long-term memory for the Hermes agent: install as /cortex, "dump your session into your cortex" / "check your cortex for X". Cloud or self-host on existing OpenRouter/Venice keys. Ships a native memory-provider plugin (`hermes/plugin/`) for ambient recall + first-class tools.
- `cortexskills.org/memory-hygiene/SKILL.md` — Migrate a full local MEMORY.md into a Cortex collection: stay/go heuristic, verify-before-delete, pointer entries. For any agent platform.
- `cortexskills.org/mcp/SKILL.md` — MCP server for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client.
- `cortexskills.org/integration/SKILL.md` — LangChain, CrewAI, MCP, Slack, automation platforms.
- `cortexskills.org/apps/SKILL.md` — Web apps that run INSIDE a Cortex instance: registry installs (sha256-verified), sandbox/proxy model, platform capabilities, share links, first-party apps.
- `cortexskills.org/builder/SKILL.md` — Build ON Cortex: docs → installable skill (builder/skill), idea → in-instance web app (builder/app). Task-DSL reference for background/scheduled app work: builder/app/tasks.md.

### Design
- `cortexskills.org/cortex-design/SKILL.md` — The Bold Typography design system for Cortex UIs.
